bedrock report for test.invalid

== DNS ==
  [WARN] No AAAA record at apex (IPv6 not advertised)
        evidence: AAAA RRset is empty
        ref:      RFC 3596
  [N/A] AXFR refusal probe
        evidence: skipped: --no-active
        ref:      RFC 5936 §6
  [PASS] No CNAME at apex (correct)
        ref:      RFC 1912 §2.4, RFC 2181 §10.3
  [INFO] No CNAME chain at www.test.invalid
        evidence: www.test.invalid is not a CNAME
        ref:      RFC 1912 §2.4
  [PASS] No dangling-DNS candidates found among probed hosts
        evidence: hosts probed: ,www,api,blog,shop,docs,status,static,assets,cdn,mail,app
        ref:      RFC 1912 §2.4
  [FAIL] Apex NS RRset
        evidence: NS lookup failed: NXDOMAIN
        fix:      Publish at least two NS records at the apex pointing to authoritative nameservers reachable over IPv4 (and ideally IPv6).
        ref:      RFC 1034 §4.1, RFC 1912 §2.8
  [N/A] Nameserver topology diversity
        evidence: no NS records resolved
        ref:      RFC 2182 §3.1
  [N/A] Nameserver IPv6 reachability
        evidence: no NS records resolved
        ref:      RFC 3596
  [WARN] Apex MX records
        evidence: lookup error: NXDOMAIN
        ref:      RFC 1912 §2.5, RFC 7505
  [FAIL] SOA record
        evidence: lookup error: NXDOMAIN
        fix:      test.invalid. IN SOA ns1.test.invalid. hostmaster.test.invalid. (
        fix:          2026041601   ; serial
        fix:          7200         ; refresh (2h)
        fix:          3600         ; retry   (1h)
        fix:          1209600      ; expire  (2w)
        fix:          3600         ; minimum (1h, RFC 2308 negative cache)
        fix:      )
        ref:      RFC 1035 §3.3.13, RFC 1912 §2.2, RFC 2308 §5

== DNSSEC ==
  [N/A] CDS/parent-DS match check skipped
        evidence: no CDS published
        ref:      RFC 7344 §4
  [INFO] No CDS/CDNSKEY published
        evidence: operator manages DS at parent manually (CDS/CDNSKEY are optional, RFC 7344 §3)
        ref:      RFC 7344 §3
  [INFO] Domain is not DNSSEC-signed
        evidence: no DS records at parent; no DNSKEY records at apex
        ref:      RFC 4033, RFC 4034, RFC 3658

== Email ==
  [INFO] BIMI Gmail gate: DMARC must be quarantine|reject, pct=100, strict alignment
        evidence: DMARC not parsed (no entry at email.dmarc.parsed)
        ref:      Gmail BIMI requirements, RFC 7489 §6.3
  [N/A] BIMI SVG viewBox is square (1:1)
        evidence: skipped: --no-active
        ref:      BIMI Group draft §4.4 (square logo requirement)
  [N/A] BIMI SVG fetched over HTTPS as image/svg+xml
        evidence: no parsed BIMI record (TXT check did not produce one)
        ref:      BIMI Group draft §4.4, BIMI SVG Tiny PS Profile
  [N/A] BIMI SVG conforms to SVG Tiny PS profile
        evidence: skipped: --no-active
        ref:      BIMI SVG Tiny PS Profile §3
  [FAIL] BIMI assertion record (default._bimi)
        evidence: no TXT record at default._bimi.test.invalid
        fix:      default._bimi.test.invalid. IN TXT "v=BIMI1; l=https://test.invalid/bimi/logo.svg; a=https://test.invalid/bimi/vmc.pem"
        ref:      BIMI Group draft §4, Gmail BIMI requirements
  [N/A] BIMI VMC chain validates against system trust store
        evidence: skipped: --no-active
        ref:      BIMI Group draft §4.5
  [INFO] BIMI Verified Mark Certificate fetched over HTTPS
        evidence: no parsed BIMI record
        ref:      BIMI Group draft §4.5, RFC 3709 (Logotype extension)
  [N/A] BIMI VMC carries the logotype extension binding the SVG
        evidence: skipped: --no-active
        ref:      RFC 3709 §4, BIMI Group draft §4.5
  [WARN] DKIM keys available for ARC signing
        evidence: ARC requires DKIM keys (none found at default._domainkey.test.invalid)
        ref:      RFC 8617 §4.1, RFC 6376
  [INFO] DMARC enforcement complements ARC
        evidence: no DMARC record cached; ARC adds value primarily once DMARC enforcement is in place
        ref:      RFC 8617 §5, RFC 7489
  [INFO] ARC (Authenticated Received Chain) deployment guidance
        evidence: ARC preserves authentication results across legitimate intermediaries (mailing lists, forwarders) by stamping ARC-Authentication-Results, ARC-Message-Signature, and ARC-Seal headers on each hop.
        ref:      RFC 8617 §4, RFC 8617 §5
  [N/A] DANE TLSA records present per MX
        evidence: no usable MX records — DANE not applicable
        ref:      RFC 7672 §2.2, RFC 6698
  [FAIL] DKIM key discoverable on a common selector
        evidence: no DKIM key found at any of: default, dkim, mail, selector1, selector2, key1, key2, k1, k2, k3, mx, s1, s2, google, google2, smtpapi, mg, mailo, pm, scph0823, scph1023, scph0124, amazonses, mfsv01, mfsv02, mfsv03, mfsv04, mfsv05, 200608, et, zendesk1, zendesk2, klaviyo, k1klaviyo, mte1, mte2, mandrill, drip, ac1, ac2, convertkit, brevo, ovh, hetzner
        fix:      <selector>._domainkey.test.invalid. IN TXT "v=DKIM1; k=rsa; p=<base64-public-key>"
        ref:      RFC 6376 §3.6.1, RFC 6376 §3.6.2
  [FAIL] DMARC record present and well-formed
        evidence: no v=DMARC1 TXT record at _dmarc.test.invalid
        fix:      _dmarc.test.invalid. IN TXT "v=DMARC1; p=reject; rua=mailto:dmarc-reports@test.invalid; adkim=s; aspf=s"
        ref:      RFC 7489 §6.3, RFC 7489 §6.4, RFC 7489 §11.2
  [N/A] MTA-STS policy file fetched and well-formed
        evidence: skipped: --no-active
        ref:      RFC 8461 §3.2
  [FAIL] MTA-STS TXT record present and well-formed
        evidence: no v=STSv1 TXT record at _mta-sts.test.invalid
        fix:      _mta-sts.test.invalid. IN TXT "v=STSv1; id=20260416000000Z"
        ref:      RFC 8461 §3.1
  [N/A] Null MX (RFC 7505) declaration
        evidence: no MX records — null MX not applicable
        ref:      RFC 7505 §3
  [INFO] DNS blocklist (DNSBL) listings
        evidence: disabled (pass --enable-rbl to query third-party blocklists)
        ref:      RFC 5782
  [N/A] STARTTLS advertised by MX
        evidence: no usable MX records
        ref:      RFC 3207 §2, RFC 5321
  [FAIL] SPF record present and well-formed
        evidence: no v=spf1 TXT record at apex
        fix:      test.invalid. IN TXT "v=spf1 -all"
        ref:      RFC 7208 §3, RFC 7208 §4.6.4, RFC 7208 §11
  [FAIL] TLS-RPT record present and well-formed
        evidence: no v=TLSRPTv1 TXT record at _smtp._tls.test.invalid
        fix:      _smtp._tls.test.invalid. IN TXT "v=TLSRPTv1; rua=mailto:tlsrpt@test.invalid"
        ref:      RFC 8460 §3

== Subdomain ==
  [INFO] Subdomain enumeration
        evidence: disabled (--subdomains off)

== WWW ==
  [WARN] CAA records present (RFC 8659)
        evidence: no CAA records at apex (any CA is permitted to issue)
        ref:      RFC 8659 §3, RFC 8659 §4
  [N/A] Certificate hygiene
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      RFC 5280
  [N/A] Cookie attributes
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      RFC 6265
  [N/A] CRL revocation check
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      RFC 5280 §5
  [INFO] Certificate Transparency log lookup
        evidence: disabled (--enable-ct off)
        ref:      RFC 6962, RFC 9162
  [N/A] Security headers
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      WHATWG Fetch, RFC 7034
  [N/A] Strict-Transport-Security
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      RFC 6797
  [N/A] HTTP/2 advertised via ALPN
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      RFC 9113, RFC 7301
  [N/A] HTTP/3 (QUIC) supported
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      RFC 9114, RFC 9000, RFC 7838, RFC 9110
  [N/A] Mixed-content scan
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      W3C Mixed Content
  [N/A] Independent OCSP responder
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      RFC 6960
  [N/A] OCSP stapling
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      RFC 6066 §8, RFC 6960
  [N/A] HTTP→HTTPS redirect hygiene
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      RFC 7525 §3.1.1
  [N/A] TLS elliptic curves accepted
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      RFC 8446 §4.2.7, RFC 8422
  [N/A] TLS profile
        evidence: active probing disabled (--no-active)
        ref:      RFC 7525
